name: copilot-extensions-harness
description: Operator harness for the copilot-extensions repo -- the portable, owner-authored skills to work ON the plugin suite (contribute changes, deploy, and diagnose the deployed runtimes). Any control repo can enable this instead of hand-writing a per-repo narrative. Ships the contributing-to-copilot-extensions and diagnosing-copilot-extensions skills. This is the reference implementation of the <repo>-harness plugin standard.
